name: Spicy Mu Shu Beef Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide the beef into 8 equal portions and cover; set aside.
2. Combine marmalade, salsa, and gingerroot in a small saucepan. Cook and stir over low heat until warm.
3. Soften tortillas according to package directions.
4. Spread about 1 tablespoon of the marmalade mixture on one side of each tortilla.
5. Sprinkle with almonds.
6. Top with beef, spinach, mushrooms, and green onions, dividing evenly among tortillas.
7. Roll up each tortilla.
8. Arrange roll-ups in a 15 x 10 1/2 x 1-inch jelly roll pan; cover tightly with aluminum foil.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes or until heated through.
10. To serve, arrange 2 roll-ups on each plate and garnish with green onion tops. Pass remaining marmalade mixture. Makes 4 servings.
